attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
  SALES_ADJ_LINE.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT     AS BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
  ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.PROCESS_DATE       AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
  ,'POS_ADJ'         AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
  ,COALESCE(POS_MTRX.PARTNER_PARTY_SITE_KEY, CAST (-999 AS INTEGER)) AS PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY1
  --,COALESCE(SALES_ADJ_LINE.DV_CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLAG,'=')   AS CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG
  , CASE 
    --WHEN SALES_ADJ_LINE.ADJUSTMENT_CODE = 'RB' THEN 'N' 
            WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'WW Distribution' THEN 'N' 
            WHEN SALES_ADJ_LINE.RU_BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE       = 'DVAD' THEN 'Y'
           -- WHEN CHNL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'POS' THEN 'Y'
            WHEN COALESCE(POS_MTRX.PARTNER_PARTY_SITE_KEY, CAST (-999 AS INTEGER)) = -999 THEN 'N'
            WHEN MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'PROVIDER' THEN
		   CASE WHEN --MPH.PARTNER_TYPE_CD='SP' AND 
		   RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE <> 'SERVICE PROVIDER' THEN 'Y'
           ELSE CASE WHEN PSH.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT = PEH.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT  THEN 'N'
           ELSE 'Y' END END      
		   WHEN (MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'RESELLER' OR MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1='DISTRIBUTOR') THEN 'Y'
		   WHEN MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'NON-RESELLER' THEN 'N' 
		   WHEN MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'UNREGISTERED' AND MT.PARTNER_TIER_CD = '1-TIER' THEN 'Y'
ELSE 'N'
       END AS CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG
  ,COALESCE(POS_MTRX.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG,'N')    AS CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG
  ,'='         AS DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG 
  ,USER          AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
  ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)        AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
  /*ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
  CASE WHEN CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='N' /*AND SALES_ORDER_KEY < 0 */ THEN 'OTHERS'
 /*WHEN CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='N' AND SALES_ORDER_KEY > 0  THEN 'DIRECT'*/
 /*WHEN  CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='Y'  AND (BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE <> 'POS' OR BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE <> 'POS_ADJ' ) THEN '1-TIER'*/
 WHEN  CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='Y'  AND /*(BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =  'POS' OR BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =  'POS_ADJ'  ) AND*/ COALESCE(MT.PARTNER_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN') = 'VAR'              
 THEN '2-TIER(VAR)'
 WHEN  CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='Y'  AND /*(BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =  'POS' OR BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =  'POS_ADJ' ) AND*/ MT.PARTNER_TYPE_CD <> 'VAR'               
 THEN 'NON-VAR THRU DISTI'
 ELSE 'OTHERS'
 END  DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD,
 CASE 
    --WHEN SALES_ADJ_LINE.ADJUSTMENT_CODE = 'RB' THEN 'REBATES' 
            WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'WW Distribution' THEN 'NON CHANNEL' 
            WHEN SALES_ADJ_LINE.RU_BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE       = 'DVAD' THEN 'CHANNEL'
           -- WHEN CHNL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'POS' THEN 'CHANNEL'
            WHEN COALESCE(POS_MTRX.PARTNER_PARTY_SITE_KEY, CAST (-999 AS INTEGER)) = -999 THEN 'NON CHANNEL'
            WHEN MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'PROVIDER' THEN
		   CASE WHEN --MPH.PARTNER_TYPE_CD='SP' AND 
		   RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE <> 'SERVICE PROVIDER' THEN 'CHANNEL'
           ELSE CASE WHEN PSH.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT = PEH.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT  THEN 'NON CHANNEL'
           ELSE 'CHANNEL' END END      
		   WHEN (MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'RESELLER' OR MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1='DISTRIBUTOR') THEN 'CHANNEL'
		   WHEN MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'NON-RESELLER' THEN 'NON CHANNEL' 
		   WHEN MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'UNREGISTERED' AND MT.PARTNER_TIER_CD = '1-TIER' THEN 'CHANNEL'
ELSE 'NON CHANNEL'
       END BOOKING_CHANNEL_TYPE 
   
 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE SALES_ADJ_LINE
 
 INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR FD
  ON SALES_ADJ_LINE.PROCESS_DATE = FD.CALENDAR_DATE
   
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL ETL
  ON ETL.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = FD.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
 
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT SALES_ADJ
  ON  SALES_ADJ_LINE.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT = SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT
  AND SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_TYPE_CODE = 'POS'
  AND SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_CODE<>'POS-OA'  /* Added this condition as part of  Q1FY15 OFFER ATTRIBUTION */ 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE POS_TRAN_LINE
  ON  SALES_ADJ_LINE.RU_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_POS_SALES_CHNNL_MATRIX POS_MTRX
  ON  POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY = POS_MTRX.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  
  AND POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT = POS_MTRX.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT  
  AND POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY = POS_MTRX.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY    
  AND CASE 
   WHEN SALES_ADJ_LINE.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG = 'Y'
    THEN CAST (-888 AS INTEGER)
   ELSE COALESCE(POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY ,CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)) 
  END      = POS_MTRX.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY  
  AND SALES_ADJ_LINE.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = POS_MTRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  /*ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
   LEFT JOIN ( select SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE, SALES_COVERAGE_CODE from  $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY group by 1,2,3) RSH
  ON SALES_ADJ_LINE.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_PARTNER_HIERARCHY MT  
 ON PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY1 = MT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY 
  AND MT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY > 0
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ENDCUST_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER PEH 
  ON PEH.END_CUSTOMER_KEY=SALES_ADJ_LINE.END_CUST_REBOK_CUST_KEY       
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SOLDTO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER PSH 
  ON PSH.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=SALES_ADJ_LINE.SOLD_TO_REBOK_CUST_KEY        
/*  LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHNL_PRTNR_GLBL_RPRTG_PRFL PTNR
  ON PTNR.PARTNER_CNTRY_PRTY_KEY = MT.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY     
  AND PTNR.BK_RPRTG_PROFILE_TYPE_NAME    ='PARTNER PRIMARY PRACTICE L1'
  AND PTNR.EFFECTIVE_END_DT='3500-01-01'
  AND MT.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY  > 0 */
  
 UNION
 
 SELECT 
  SALES_ADJ_LINE.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT     AS BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
  ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.PROCESS_DATE       AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
  ,'POS_ADJ'         AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
  ,COALESCE(POS_MTRX.PARTNER_PARTY_SITE_KEY, CAST (-999 AS INTEGER)) AS PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY1
  --,COALESCE(SALES_ADJ_LINE.DV_CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLAG,'=')   AS CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG
  ,CASE 
    --WHEN SALES_ADJ_LINE.ADJUSTMENT_CODE = 'RB' THEN 'N' 
            WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'WW Distribution' THEN 'N' 
            WHEN SALES_ADJ_LINE.RU_BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE       = 'DVAD' THEN 'Y'
           -- WHEN CHNL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'POS' THEN 'Y'
            WHEN COALESCE(POS_MTRX.PARTNER_PARTY_SITE_KEY, CAST (-999 AS INTEGER)) = -999 THEN 'N'
            WHEN MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'PROVIDER' THEN
		   CASE WHEN --MPH.PARTNER_TYPE_CD='SP' AND 
		   RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE <> 'SERVICE PROVIDER' THEN 'Y'
           ELSE CASE WHEN PSH.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT = PEH.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT  THEN 'N'
           ELSE 'Y' END END      
		   WHEN (MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'RESELLER' OR MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1='DISTRIBUTOR') THEN 'Y'
		   WHEN MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'NON-RESELLER' THEN 'N' 
		   WHEN MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'UNREGISTERED' AND MT.PARTNER_TIER_CD = '1-TIER' THEN 'Y'
ELSE 'N' 
       END AS CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG
  ,COALESCE(POS_MTRX.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG,'N')    AS CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG
  ,'='         AS DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG 
  ,USER          AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
  ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)        AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
  /*ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
  CASE WHEN CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='N' /*AND SALES_ORDER_KEY < 0 */ THEN 'OTHERS'
 /*WHEN CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='N' AND SALES_ORDER_KEY > 0  THEN 'DIRECT'*/
 /*WHEN  CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='Y'  AND (BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE <> 'POS' OR BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE <> 'POS_ADJ' ) THEN '1-TIER'*/
 WHEN  CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='Y'  AND /*(BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =  'POS' OR BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =  'POS_ADJ'  ) AND*/ COALESCE(MT.PARTNER_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN') = 'VAR'              
 THEN '2-TIER(VAR)'
 WHEN  CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='Y'  AND /*(BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =  'POS' OR BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =  'POS_ADJ' ) AND*/ MT.PARTNER_TYPE_CD <> 'VAR'               
 THEN 'NON-VAR THRU DISTI'
 ELSE 'OTHERS'
 END  DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD ,
CASE 
    --WHEN SALES_ADJ_LINE.ADJUSTMENT_CODE = 'RB' THEN 'REBATES' 
            WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'WW Distribution' THEN 'NON CHANNEL' 
            WHEN SALES_ADJ_LINE.RU_BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE       = 'DVAD' THEN 'CHANNEL'
           -- WHEN CHNL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'POS' THEN 'CHANNEL'
            WHEN COALESCE(POS_MTRX.PARTNER_PARTY_SITE_KEY, CAST (-999 AS INTEGER)) = -999 THEN 'NON CHANNEL'
            WHEN MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'PROVIDER' THEN
		   CASE WHEN --MPH.PARTNER_TYPE_CD='SP' AND 
		   RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE <> 'SERVICE PROVIDER' THEN 'CHANNEL'
           ELSE CASE WHEN PSH.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT = PEH.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT  THEN 'NON CHANNEL'
           ELSE 'CHANNEL' END END      
		   WHEN (MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'RESELLER' OR MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1='DISTRIBUTOR') THEN 'CHANNEL'
		   WHEN MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'NON-RESELLER' THEN 'NON CHANNEL' 
		   WHEN MT.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'UNREGISTERED' AND MT.PARTNER_TIER_CD = '1-TIER' THEN 'CHANNEL'
ELSE 'NON CHANNEL' 
       END BOOKING_CHANNEL_TYPE  
  
 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE SALES_ADJ_LINE
 
 INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR FD
  ON SALES_ADJ_LINE.PROCESS_DATE = FD.CALENDAR_DATE
   
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL ETL
  ON ETL.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = FD.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
 
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT SALES_ADJ
  ON  SALES_ADJ_LINE.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT = SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT
  AND SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_TYPE_CODE = 'POS'
  AND SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_CODE<>'POS-OA'  /* Added this condition as part of  Q1FY15 OFFER ATTRIBUTION */ 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKG_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE POS_TRAN_LINE
  ON  SALES_ADJ_LINE.RU_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_POS_SALES_CHNNL_MATRIX POS_MTRX
  ON  POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY = POS_MTRX.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
  AND POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT = POS_MTRX.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT  
  AND POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY = POS_MTRX.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  
  AND CASE 
   WHEN SALES_ADJ_LINE.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG = 'Y'
    THEN CAST (-888 AS INTEGER)
   ELSE COALESCE(POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY ,CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)) 
  END      = POS_MTRX.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY  
  AND SALES_ADJ_LINE.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = POS_MTRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  /*ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
    LEFT JOIN( select SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE, SALES_COVERAGE_CODE from  $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY group by 1,2,3) RSH
  ON SALES_ADJ_LINE.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
  
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_PARTNER_HIERARCHY MT  
 ON PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY1 = MT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY 
  AND MT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY > 0
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ENDCUST_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER PEH 
  ON PEH.END_CUSTOMER_KEY=SALES_ADJ_LINE.END_CUST_REBOK_CUST_KEY       
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SOLDTO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER PSH 
  ON PSH.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=SALES_ADJ_LINE.SOLD_TO_REBOK_CUST_KEY        
/*  LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHNL_PRTNR_GLBL_RPRTG_PRFL PTNR
  ON PTNR.PARTNER_CNTRY_PRTY_KEY = MT.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY     
  AND PTNR.BK_RPRTG_PROFILE_TYPE_NAME    ='PARTNER PRIMARY PRACTICE L1'
  AND PTNR.EFFECTIVE_END_DT='3500-01-01'
  AND MT.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY  > 0 */
  
  /*  Removed the below query as part of Q3 FY15 --OA
  UNION ALL
  /* Added the below query as part of  Q1FY15 OFFER ATTRIBUTION *
 SELECT 
  SALES_ADJ_LINE.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT     AS BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
  ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.PROCESS_DATE       AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
  ,'POS'         AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
  ,COALESCE(POS_MTRX.PARTNER_PARTY_SITE_KEY, CAST (-999 AS INTEGER)) AS PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
  ,COALESCE(SALES_ADJ_LINE.DV_CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLAG,'=')   AS CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG
  ,COALESCE(POS_MTRX.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG,'N')    AS CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG
  ,'='         AS DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG 
  ,USER          AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
  ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)        AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
   
 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE SALES_ADJ_LINE
 
 INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR FD
  ON SALES_ADJ_LINE.PROCESS_DATE = FD.CALENDAR_DATE
 
  
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL ETL
  ON ETL.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = FD.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
 
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT SALES_ADJ
  ON  SALES_ADJ_LINE.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT = SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT
  AND SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_TYPE_CODE = 'POS'
  AND SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_CODE='POS-OA'
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE POS_TRAN_LINE
  ON  SALES_ADJ_LINE.RU_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_POS_SALES_CHNNL_MATRIX POS_MTRX
  ON  POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY = POS_MTRX.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY   
  AND CASE 
   WHEN SALES_ADJ_LINE.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG = 'Y'
    THEN CAST (-888 AS INTEGER)
   ELSE COALESCE(POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY ,CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)) 
  END      = POS_MTRX.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY  
  AND SALES_ADJ_LINE.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = POS_MTRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  */

SELECT 
   POS_DETAIL.ALLOCATED_POS_ADJ_KEY      AS BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
  ,POS_DETAIL.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT       AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
  ,'POS'          AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
  ,COALESCE(POS_MTRX.PARTNER_PARTY_SITE_KEY, CAST (-999 AS INTEGER)) AS PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY1
  --,COALESCE(POS_DETAIL.CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG,'=')    AS CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG
  , CASE 
            WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'WW Distribution' THEN 'N' 
            WHEN POS_DETAIL.SALES_CHANNEL_CD = 'DVAD' THEN 'Y'
			ELSE 'Y'
       END AS CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG
  ,COALESCE(POS_MTRX.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG,'N')    AS CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG
  ,'='         AS DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG 
  ,USER          AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
  ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)       AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
  /*ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
  CASE WHEN CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='N' /*AND SALES_ORDER_KEY < 0 */ THEN 'OTHERS'
 /*WHEN CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='N' AND SALES_ORDER_KEY > 0  THEN 'DIRECT'*/
 /*WHEN  CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='Y'  AND (BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE <> 'POS' OR BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE <> 'POS_ADJ' ) THEN '1-TIER'*/
 WHEN  CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='Y'  AND /*(BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =  'POS' OR BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =  'POS_ADJ'  ) AND*/ COALESCE(MT.PARTNER_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN') = 'VAR'              
 THEN '2-TIER(VAR)'
 WHEN  CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='Y'  AND /*(BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =  'POS' OR BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =  'POS_ADJ' ) AND*/ MT.PARTNER_TYPE_CD <> 'VAR'               
 THEN 'NON-VAR THRU DISTI'
 ELSE 'OTHERS'
 END  DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD ,
 CASE 
            WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'WW Distribution' THEN 'NON CHANNEL' 
            WHEN POS_DETAIL.SALES_CHANNEL_CD = 'DVAD' THEN 'CHANNEL'
			ELSE 'CHANNEL'
       END BOOKING_CHANNEL_TYPE  
 FROM 
 $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_DRVD_NRT_POS_TRX POS_DETAIL
 /*INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR FD
  ON POS_DETAIL.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT = FD.CALENDAR_DATE*/
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL ETL
  ON ETL.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = POS_DETAIL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
 
 
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE POS_TRANS
  ON POS_DETAIL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = POS_TRANS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_POS_SALES_CHNNL_MATRIX POS_MTRX
  ON POS_TRANS.BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY = POS_MTRX.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
  AND POS_TRANS.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT = POS_MTRX.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
  AND POS_TRANS.BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY = POS_MTRX.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
  AND CASE 
   WHEN POS_DETAIL.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG = 'Y'
    THEN CAST (-888 AS INTEGER)
   ELSE COALESCE(POS_TRANS.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)) 
   END        = POS_MTRX.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY   
  AND POS_DETAIL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = POS_MTRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  /*ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
LEFT JOIN ( select SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE, SALES_COVERAGE_CODE from  $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY group by 1,2,3) RSH
  ON POS_DETAIL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_PARTNER_HIERARCHY MT  
 ON PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY1 = MT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY  
 
  
  UNION  
 
 SELECT 
   POS_DETAIL.ALLOCATED_POS_ADJ_KEY      AS BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
  ,POS_DETAIL.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT       AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
  ,'POS'          AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
  ,COALESCE(POS_MTRX.PARTNER_PARTY_SITE_KEY, CAST (-999 AS INTEGER)) AS PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY1
  --,COALESCE(POS_DETAIL.CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG,'=')    AS CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG
  ,  CASE  
            WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'WW Distribution' THEN 'N' 
            WHEN POS_DETAIL.SALES_CHANNEL_CD = 'DVAD' THEN 'Y'
			ELSE 'Y'
       END AS CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG
  ,COALESCE(POS_MTRX.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG,'N')    AS CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG
  ,'='         AS DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG 
  ,USER          AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
  ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)       AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
  /*ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
  CASE WHEN CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='N' /*AND SALES_ORDER_KEY < 0 */ THEN 'OTHERS'
 /*WHEN CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='N' AND SALES_ORDER_KEY > 0  THEN 'DIRECT'*/
 /*WHEN  CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='Y'  AND (BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE <> 'POS' OR BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE <> 'POS_ADJ' ) THEN '1-TIER'*/
 WHEN  CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='Y'  AND /*(BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =  'POS' OR BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =  'POS_ADJ'  ) AND*/ COALESCE(MT.PARTNER_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN') = 'VAR'                
 THEN '2-TIER(VAR)'
 WHEN  CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='Y'  AND /*(BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =  'POS' OR BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =  'POS_ADJ' ) AND*/ MT.PARTNER_TYPE_CD <> 'VAR'               
 THEN 'NON-VAR THRU DISTI'
 ELSE 'OTHERS'
 END  DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD ,
  CASE  
            WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'WW Distribution' THEN 'NON CHANNEL' 
            WHEN POS_DETAIL.SALES_CHANNEL_CD = 'DVAD' THEN 'CHANNEL'
			ELSE 'CHANNEL'
       END BOOKING_CHANNEL_TYPE 
 
 FROM 
 $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_DRVD_NRT_POS_TRX POS_DETAIL 
 /*INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR FD
  ON POS_DETAIL.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT = FD.CALENDAR_DATE*/
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL ETL
  ON ETL.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = POS_DETAIL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
 
 
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKG_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE POS_BKG
  ON POS_DETAIL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = POS_BKG.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_POS_SALES_CHNNL_MATRIX POS_MTRX
  ON POS_BKG.BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY = POS_MTRX.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
  AND POS_BKG.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT = POS_MTRX.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
  AND POS_BKG.BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY = POS_MTRX.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
  AND CASE 
 WHEN POS_DETAIL.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG = 'Y'
          THEN CAST (-888 AS INTEGER)
        ELSE COALESCE(POS_BKG.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)) 
      END = POS_MTRX.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY   
  AND POS_DETAIL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = POS_MTRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  /*ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_PARTNER_HIERARCHY MT  
 ON PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY1 = MT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
 LEFT JOIN ( select SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE, SALES_COVERAGE_CODE from  $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY group by 1,2,3) RSH  
  ON POS_DETAIL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
